title: Scanalyze Observability Export Schema v1
description: Schema for operational metadata that may leave the customer account. Strict additionalProperties: false at every level. Enforces forbidden dimensions and content rules per ADR-009.
$comment: FORBIDDEN: document_id, batch_id, invocation_id as metric dimensions. FORBIDDEN: document text, OCR output, LLM responses, JWTs, CURP/RFC/NSS/CLABE, raw exception payloads, S3 keys with PII. Primary dimension is deployment_id, NOT customer_id on every metric.
